$description: Windows 11 / WinUI 3 overrides. Mica on the window root, Acrylic on flyouts, MicaAlt on settings pages. User brand color tints Mica via ResourceDictionary ThemeDictionaries.

window.$description: Root window backdrop. MicaController with user brand as TintColor. Generator attaches via SystemBackdrop in App.xaml.cs.

omnibar.$description: Omnibar does NOT get its own material — it sits on Mica and uses a solid sunken fill so the edit affordance is unambiguous.

accent.$description: Pre-theme: follow Windows accent color (ColorHelper.FromArgb from UISettings). Post-theme: use user brand.

shape.$description: WinUI corner radius conventions: ControlCornerRadius=4, OverlayCornerRadius=8. We override slightly larger for the omnibar.

reveal.$description: RevealBrush hover effect on omnibar buttons. Disabled by default (perceived as dated in 2026); re-enable via theme preset 'classic-windows'.
